commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a36756ad031657439edcc12c37ab52ac3c6a237f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows the local gateway memory-watch config warning to large configured memory trees by adding a bounded Markdown-file scan and focused validation-policy tests.

PR surface: Source +136, Tests +79. Total +215 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: with `memory.backend: "qmd"`, `memory.qmd.includeDefaultMemory: false`, and more than 2,000 files under `workspace/memory`, the PR still scans that default root and can emit the warning even though QMD does not configure that collection. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This maintainer-labeled PR should stay in human PR review; the concrete blocker is for the branch author or maintainer reviewer to address before merge, not a cleanup close or automatic repair lane.

target.title: fix(config): warn only on large memory watch trees
target.body:
## Summary

- limit the gateway memory-watch FD warning to configured memory roots with more than 2,000 markdown files
- keep the startup scan bounded by streaming directory entries, stopping after the warning threshold, and capping traversal at 20,000 entries
- add focused validation-policy coverage for default QMD configs, threshold behavior, disabled watch, remote gateway, and per-agent overrides

## Related

- Follow-up to #89185, which added the gateway memory-watch warning but warned on config shape alone.
- Refs #86613, where FD pressure was reproduced with large watched memory trees.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/config/validation.ts src/config/validation.policy.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.policy.test.ts`
- local scan benchmark for 20,000 temp markdown files: about 13-15 ms per bounded scan on this machine
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
